get_polymarket-markets.heading_zh: 查询预测市场列表 get_polymarket-markets
get_polymarket-markets.desc_en: List prediction markets with optional filtering (by slug, condition ID, token ID, tags, status, volume, time range) and keyword search. Results are ordered by volume when filters are applied, or by start time otherwise, and paginated via a cursor.
get_polymarket-markets.description_zh: 查询预测市场列表，支持按 slug、condition ID、token ID、标签、状态、成交量、时间范围筛选及关键词搜索。施加筛选时按成交量排序，否则按开始时间排序，并以游标分页。

get_polymarket-events.desc_en: List events, which group related markets under a single topic, with optional filtering by event slug, tags, status, and time range. Optionally embeds each event's markets when include_markets is enabled. Results are ordered by total volume and paginated via a cursor.
get_polymarket-events.description_zh: 查询事件列表。事件将相关市场聚合到同一主题下，支持按事件 slug、标签、状态、时间范围筛选；开启 include_markets 时内嵌各事件的市场。结果按总成交量排序并以游标分页。

get_polymarket-orders.heading_zh: 查询订单成交记录 get_polymarket-orders
get_polymarket-orders.desc_en: List on-chain order/trade records, optionally filtered by market, condition, token, user wallet, and time range. With no filters it returns the latest real-time trades. Only one of market_slug, token_id, or condition_id may be supplied.
get_polymarket-orders.description_zh: 查询链上订单/成交记录，可按市场、condition、token、用户钱包及时间范围筛选；不传筛选时返回最新的实时成交。market_slug、token_id、condition_id 三者只能择一传入。

get_polymarket-orderbooks.heading_zh: 查询历史订单簿快照 get_polymarket-orderbooks
get_polymarket-orderbooks.desc_en: Fetch historical order book snapshots for an outcome token over a time range; when no time range is given, returns only the latest snapshot. Each snapshot contains bids, asks, and market metadata. All timestamps are in milliseconds.
get_polymarket-orderbooks.description_zh: 查询某结果 token 在指定时间范围内的历史订单簿快照；不传时间范围时仅返回最新一份快照。每份快照包含买单、卖单及市场元数据，所有时间戳均为毫秒。

get_polymarket-activity.heading_zh: 查询账户活动记录 get_polymarket-activity
get_polymarket-activity.desc_en: List on-chain account activity (merges, splits, and redeems), optionally filtered by user wallet, market, condition, and time range, with cursor-based pagination.
get_polymarket-activity.description_zh: 查询链上账户活动（合并 MERGE、拆分 SPLIT、赎回 REDEEM），可按用户钱包、市场、condition 及时间范围筛选，并支持游标分页。

get_polymarket-market-price.desc_en: Get the current price of an outcome token by token_id; when at_time is supplied, returns the historical price at that timestamp instead of the latest.
get_polymarket-market-price.description_zh: 按 token_id 查询某结果 token 的当前价格；传入 at_time 时返回该时间点的历史价格，否则返回最新价格。

get_polymarket-positions.desc_en: List all Polymarket positions held by a proxy wallet, including per-position market info. Only positions with a balance of at least 10,000 raw shares (0.01 normalized) are returned, with cursor-based pagination.
get_polymarket-positions.description_zh: 查询某代理钱包持有的全部 Polymarket 持仓，含每个持仓的市场信息。仅返回余额不低于 10,000 原始份额（归一化 0.01）的持仓，并支持游标分页。

get_polymarket-wallet.desc_en: Look up wallet information by EOA address, proxy address, or user handle, returning the associated EOA, proxy, wallet type, handle, pseudonym, and profile image. Trading metrics are included only when with_metrics=true.
get_polymarket-wallet.description_zh: 按 EOA 地址、代理地址或用户 handle 查询钱包信息，返回关联的 EOA、代理、钱包类型、handle、化名与头像。仅当 with_metrics=true 时附带交易指标。

get_polymarket-candlesticks.heading_zh: 查询 K 线数据 get_polymarket-candlesticks
get_polymarket-candlesticks.desc_en: Fetch historical candlestick (OHLC) data for a market identified by condition_id over a time range, at a 1-minute, 1-hour, or 1-day interval. Each interval enforces a maximum lookback range.
get_polymarket-candlesticks.description_zh: 按 condition_id 查询某市场在指定时间范围内的历史 K 线（OHLC）数据，可选 1 分钟、1 小时或 1 天的时间粒度。不同粒度有各自的最大回溯范围限制。

get_polymarket-wallet-pnl.heading_zh: 查询钱包已实现盈亏 get_polymarket-wallet-pnl
get_polymarket-wallet-pnl.desc_en: Return a wallet's REALIZED profit and loss over a time range at a chosen granularity. Only realized gains from confirmed sells or redeems are counted, so values differ from Polymarket's dashboard, which shows unrealized PnL.
get_polymarket-wallet-pnl.description_zh: 按选定粒度返回某钱包在指定时间范围内的「已实现」盈亏。仅计入确认卖出或赎回带来的已实现收益，因此与展示未实现盈亏的 Polymarket 看板数值不同。

market_slug.desc_en: Restrict results to markets with these slugs; a slug is the market's URL identifier. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
market_slug.title_zh: 按市场 slug（市场的 URL 标识）筛选，可重复传入多个值。

event_slug.desc_en: Restrict results to markets belonging to events with these slugs. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
event_slug.title_zh: 按所属事件的 slug 筛选，可重复传入多个值。

condition_id.desc_en: Restrict results to markets with these on-chain condition IDs. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
condition_id.title_zh: 按市场链上 condition ID 筛选，可重复传入多个值。

token_id.desc_en: Restrict results to markets whose primary or secondary outcome token matches these token IDs. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
token_id.title_zh: 按结果 token ID 筛选，命中市场的 primary 或 secondary token 即返回，可重复传入多个值。

tags.desc_en: Restrict results to markets carrying these category tags. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
tags.title_zh: 按市场所带的分类标签筛选，可重复传入多个值。

search.desc_en: Fuzzy keyword search across market titles and descriptions; the value must be URL-encoded. Cannot be combined with other filter parameters.
search.title_zh: 对市场标题与描述做模糊关键词搜索，取值需 URL 编码；不可与其他筛选参数同时使用。

status.desc_en: Restrict results to markets that are currently open or already closed.
status.title_zh: 按市场当前是开放还是已关闭筛选。

min_volume.desc_en: Only return markets whose total trading volume (in USD) is at least this amount.
min_volume.title_zh: 仅返回累计成交量（美元）不低于该值的市场。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of markets to return in this page.
limit.title_zh: 本页最多返回的市场数量。

pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass back the value from the previous response's pagination object. Preferred over large offsets for performance.
pagination_key.title_zh: 翻页游标，回传上一页响应 pagination 中的值；相比大偏移量更高效。

start_time.desc_en: Only return markets at or after this start time, given as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
start_time.title_zh: 仅返回开始时间不早于此刻的市场，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.desc_en: Only return markets at or before this time, given as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
end_time.title_zh: 仅返回时间不晚于此刻的市场，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

markets.desc_en: The list of markets matching the query.
markets.title_zh: 匹配查询条件的市场列表。

markets.event_slug.desc_en: Slug of the event this market belongs to; null when the market is not part of an event.
markets.event_slug.title_zh: 该市场所属事件的 slug；不属于任何事件时为 null。

markets.condition_id.desc_en: On-chain condition ID identifying the market.
markets.condition_id.title_zh: 标识该市场的链上 condition ID。

markets.title.title_zh: 市场的可读问题或标题。

markets.start_time.desc_en: When trading on the market opens, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
markets.start_time.title_zh: 市场开盘时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

markets.end_time.desc_en: When trading on the market ends, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
markets.end_time.title_zh: 市场结束时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

markets.completed_time.desc_en: When the market was completed, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; null if not yet completed.
markets.completed_time.title_zh: 市场完成时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；尚未完成时为 null。

markets.close_time.desc_en: When the market was closed, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; null if still open.
markets.close_time.title_zh: 市场关闭时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仍开放时为 null。

markets.game_start_time.desc_en: For sports markets, the UTC datetime when the underlying game starts; null otherwise.
markets.game_start_time.title_zh: 体育类市场中对应赛事的开始时间（UTC）；非体育市场为 null。

markets.tags.desc_en: Category tags attached to the market.

markets.volume_1_week.desc_en: Trading volume over the past week, in USD.
markets.volume_1_week.title_zh: 过去一周的成交量（美元）。

markets.volume_1_month.desc_en: Trading volume over the past month, in USD.
markets.volume_1_month.title_zh: 过去一个月的成交量（美元）。

markets.volume_1_year.desc_en: Trading volume over the past year, in USD.
markets.volume_1_year.title_zh: 过去一年的成交量（美元）。

markets.volume_total.desc_en: Cumulative trading volume since inception, in USD.
markets.volume_total.title_zh: 自创建以来的累计成交量（美元）。

markets.resolution_source.desc_en: URL of the data source used to resolve the market outcome.
markets.resolution_source.title_zh: 用于裁定市场结果的数据源 URL。

markets.image.desc_en: URL of the market's display image.

markets.description.desc_en: Detailed market description including resolution criteria; null when unavailable.
markets.description.title_zh: 市场的详细描述（含裁定标准）；无内容时为 null。

markets.negative_risk_id.desc_en: Identifier linking related mutually-exclusive markets under a negative-risk group; null when not applicable.
markets.negative_risk_id.title_zh: 将互斥相关市场归入 negative-risk 组的标识；不适用时为 null。

markets.side_a.desc_en: The first of the two market outcomes.
markets.side_a.title_zh: 市场两个结果中的第一个。

markets.side_a.id.desc_en: Outcome token ID for side A.
markets.side_a.id.title_zh: side A 的结果 token ID。

markets.side_a.label.desc_en: Display label for side A's outcome.
markets.side_a.label.title_zh: side A 结果的展示标签。

markets.side_b.desc_en: The second of the two market outcomes.
markets.side_b.title_zh: 市场两个结果中的第二个。

markets.side_b.id.desc_en: Outcome token ID for side B.
markets.side_b.id.title_zh: side B 的结果 token ID。

markets.side_b.label.desc_en: Display label for side B's outcome.
markets.side_b.label.title_zh: side B 结果的展示标签。

markets.winning_side.desc_en: The outcome that won once resolved; null until the market is resolved.
markets.winning_side.title_zh: 裁定后的获胜结果；未裁定前为 null。

markets.status.desc_en: Whether the market is currently open or closed.
markets.status.title_zh: 市场当前为开放还是已关闭。

markets.extra_fields.desc_en: Map of market-specific extra fields; for up/down markets it includes price_to_beat and final_price. Empty when none apply.
markets.extra_fields.title_zh: 市场专有的附加字段映射；涨跌（up/down）类市场含 price_to_beat 与 final_price。无附加字段时为空对象。

pagination.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.limit.desc_en: The page size applied to this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应采用的页大小。

pagination.total.desc_en: Total number of markets matching the filters across all pages.
pagination.total.title_zh: 所有页中匹配筛选条件的市场总数。

pagination.has_more.desc_en: Whether further pages of results are available.
pagination.has_more.title_zh: 是否还有更多结果页可取。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor to request the next page; present only when has_more is true under cursor pagination.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 请求下一页的游标；仅在游标分页且 has_more 为 true 时出现。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

event_slug.desc_en: Return the single event matching this slug; combine with include_markets=true to also embed its markets.
event_slug.title_zh: 返回与该 slug 匹配的单个事件；配合 include_markets=true 可一并内嵌其市场。

tags.desc_en: Restrict results to events carrying these category tags. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
tags.title_zh: 按事件所带的分类标签筛选，可重复传入多个值。

status.desc_en: Filter by event status; an event is open if any of its markets is open, otherwise closed.
status.title_zh: 按事件状态筛选；只要有一个市场开放即视为 open，全部关闭则为 closed。

include_markets.desc_en: Pass true to embed the full list of markets within each returned event.
include_markets.title_zh: 传 true 时在每个返回事件中内嵌其完整市场列表。

start_time.desc_en: Only return events starting at or after this Unix timestamp in seconds.
start_time.title_zh: 仅返回开始时间不早于此刻的事件，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.desc_en: Only return events starting at or before this Unix timestamp in seconds.
end_time.title_zh: 仅返回开始时间不晚于此刻的事件，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

game_start_time.desc_en: Filter sports events by when the underlying game starts, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
game_start_time.title_zh: 按对应赛事开始时间筛选体育类事件，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of events to return in this page.
limit.title_zh: 本页最多返回的事件数量。

pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass back pagination.pagination_key from the previous response. Do not use the deprecated offset parameter.
pagination_key.title_zh: 翻页游标，回传上一页响应的 pagination.pagination_key；请勿使用已废弃的 offset 参数。

events.desc_en: The list of events matching the query.
events.title_zh: 匹配查询条件的事件列表。

events.event_slug.desc_en: URL identifier uniquely naming the event.
events.event_slug.title_zh: 唯一标识事件的 URL slug。

events.subtitle.desc_en: Optional subtitle or short description of the event; null when absent.
events.subtitle.title_zh: 事件的副标题或简短描述；无则为 null。

events.status.desc_en: Aggregate event status: open if any market is open, closed if all are closed.
events.status.title_zh: 事件的聚合状态：有任一市场开放为 open，全部关闭为 closed。

events.start_time.desc_en: When the event started, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
events.start_time.title_zh: 事件开始时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

events.end_time.desc_en: When the event ends, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
events.end_time.title_zh: 事件结束时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

events.volume_fiat_amount.desc_en: Total trading volume across all markets in the event, in USD.
events.volume_fiat_amount.title_zh: 事件下所有市场的总成交量（美元）。

events.settlement_sources.desc_en: Source used to settle/resolve the event; null when unspecified.
events.settlement_sources.title_zh: 用于结算/裁定事件的来源；未指定时为 null。

events.rules_url.desc_en: Link to the event's rules; null when unavailable.
events.rules_url.title_zh: 事件规则的链接；无则为 null。

events.image.desc_en: URL of the event's display image; null when none.
events.image.title_zh: 事件展示图片的 URL；无则为 null。

events.tags.desc_en: Category tags attached to the event.

events.market_count.desc_en: Number of markets grouped under this event.
events.market_count.title_zh: 该事件下聚合的市场数量。

events.markets.desc_en: Markets belonging to this event; populated only when include_markets=true.
events.markets.title_zh: 该事件下的市场；仅在 include_markets=true 时填充。

events.markets.market_slug.desc_en: URL identifier of the embedded market.
events.markets.market_slug.title_zh: 内嵌市场的 URL 标识。

events.markets.condition_id.desc_en: On-chain condition ID of the embedded market.
events.markets.condition_id.title_zh: 内嵌市场的链上 condition ID。

events.markets.status.desc_en: Whether the embedded market is open or closed.
events.markets.status.title_zh: 内嵌市场为开放还是已关闭。

events.markets.volume_total.desc_en: Cumulative trading volume of the embedded market, in USD.
events.markets.volume_total.title_zh: 内嵌市场的累计成交量（美元）。

pagination.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.limit.desc_en: Number of events returned in this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应返回的事件数量。

pagination.has_more.desc_en: Whether further pages are available; if true, use pagination_key to continue.
pagination.has_more.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为 true 时用 pagination_key 继续翻页。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor to fetch the next page; null when has_more is false.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 获取下一页的游标；has_more 为 false 时为 null。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

market_slug.desc_en: Restrict orders to a single market identified by its slug. Mutually exclusive with token_id and condition_id.
market_slug.title_zh: 按市场 slug 限定订单，与 token_id、condition_id 互斥。

condition_id.desc_en: Restrict orders to a single market identified by its on-chain condition ID. Mutually exclusive with market_slug and token_id.
condition_id.title_zh: 按链上 condition ID 限定订单，与 market_slug、token_id 互斥。

token_id.desc_en: Restrict orders to those touching this outcome token ID. Mutually exclusive with market_slug and condition_id.
token_id.title_zh: 按结果 token ID 限定订单，与 market_slug、condition_id 互斥。

start_time.desc_en: Only return orders placed at or after this Unix timestamp in seconds.
start_time.title_zh: 仅返回下单时间不早于此刻的订单，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.desc_en: Only return orders placed at or before this Unix timestamp in seconds.
end_time.title_zh: 仅返回下单时间不晚于此刻的订单，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of orders to return in this page.
limit.title_zh: 本页最多返回的订单数量。

pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass back the value from the previous response's pagination object.
pagination_key.title_zh: 翻页游标，回传上一页响应 pagination 中的值。

user.desc_en: Restrict orders to those made by this user wallet address.
user.title_zh: 按用户钱包地址限定订单。

orders.desc_en: The list of matching order/trade records.
orders.title_zh: 匹配的订单/成交记录列表。

orders.token_id.desc_en: Outcome token ID this order traded.
orders.token_id.title_zh: 该订单交易的结果 token ID。

orders.token_label.desc_en: Human-readable label of the traded outcome (e.g. Yes/No).
orders.token_label.title_zh: 所交易结果的可读标签（如 Yes/No）。

orders.side.desc_en: Whether the order bought or sold the outcome token.
orders.side.title_zh: 该订单是买入还是卖出结果 token。

orders.market_slug.desc_en: Slug of the market the order belongs to.

orders.condition_id.desc_en: On-chain condition ID of the order's market.
orders.condition_id.title_zh: 订单所属市场的链上 condition ID。

orders.shares.desc_en: Raw share quantity as recorded on-chain (before normalization).
orders.shares.title_zh: 链上记录的原始份额数量（未归一化）。

orders.shares_normalized.desc_en: Share quantity normalized to whole-share units (raw value scaled down by 1,000,000).
orders.shares_normalized.title_zh: 归一化后的份额数量（原始值除以 1,000,000）。

orders.price.annotation: 源码未声明价格单位与取值范围，待研发确认。

orders.block_number.desc_en: Block height at which the order was recorded on-chain.
orders.block_number.title_zh: 订单上链所在的区块高度。

orders.log_index.desc_en: Index of the order's event log within its block.
orders.log_index.title_zh: 订单事件日志在区块内的索引。

orders.tx_hash.desc_en: Hash of the transaction that recorded the order.
orders.tx_hash.title_zh: 记录该订单的交易哈希。

orders.timestamp.desc_en: When the order was placed, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
orders.timestamp.title_zh: 下单时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

orders.user.desc_en: Maker wallet address of the order.
orders.user.title_zh: 订单的 maker 钱包地址。

orders.taker.desc_en: Taker wallet address in the trade; note it is often the CTF exchange rather than the true counterparty, so use with caution.
orders.taker.title_zh: 成交中的 taker 钱包地址；注意它常是 CTF 交易所而非真实对手方，使用时需谨慎。

pagination.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.limit.desc_en: The page size applied to this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应采用的页大小。

pagination.offset.desc_en: Offset applied to this response under offset-based paging.
pagination.offset.title_zh: 基于偏移分页时本次响应采用的偏移量。

pagination.total.desc_en: Total number of orders matching the filters.
pagination.total.title_zh: 匹配筛选条件的订单总数。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; present only when more results exist. Prefer it over offset.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 下一页的游标；仅在还有更多结果时出现，优先于 offset 使用。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

docs.desc_en: Link to documentation explaining the deprecation and the recommended pagination approach.
docs.title_zh: 指向相关文档的链接，说明该废弃项及推荐的分页方式。

token_id.desc_en: The outcome token (asset) whose order book snapshots are requested.
token_id.title_zh: 待查询订单簿快照的结果 token（资产）。

start_time.desc_en: Start of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds; omit together with end_time to get the latest snapshot only.
start_time.title_zh: 时间范围起点，Unix 时间戳（毫秒）；与 end_time 一并省略时仅取最新快照。

end_time.desc_en: End of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds; omit together with start_time to get the latest snapshot only.
end_time.title_zh: 时间范围终点，Unix 时间戳（毫秒）；与 start_time 一并省略时仅取最新快照。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of snapshots to return; ignored when fetching only the latest snapshot.
limit.title_zh: 最多返回的快照数量；仅取最新快照时忽略该参数。

pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor for the next chunk of snapshots; ignored when fetching only the latest snapshot.
pagination_key.title_zh: 获取下一批快照的游标；仅取最新快照时忽略该参数。

snapshots.desc_en: Order book snapshots at successive points in time.
snapshots.title_zh: 按时间先后排列的订单簿快照。

snapshots.asks.desc_en: Sell-side order book levels, ordered by price.
snapshots.asks.title_zh: 卖方订单簿档位，按价格排序。

snapshots.asks.size.desc_en: Quantity available at this ask level.
snapshots.asks.size.title_zh: 该卖单档位可成交的数量。

snapshots.bids.desc_en: Buy-side order book levels, ordered by price.
snapshots.bids.title_zh: 买方订单簿档位，按价格排序。

snapshots.bids.size.desc_en: Quantity available at this bid level.
snapshots.bids.size.title_zh: 该买单档位可成交的数量。

snapshots.hash.title_zh: 标识该快照内容的哈希。

snapshots.minOrderSize.desc_en: Minimum allowed order size for this market.
snapshots.minOrderSize.title_zh: 该市场允许的最小下单数量。

snapshots.negRisk.desc_en: Whether the market is part of a negative-risk group.
snapshots.negRisk.title_zh: 该市场是否属于 negative-risk 组。

snapshots.assetId.desc_en: The outcome token (asset) this snapshot is for.
snapshots.assetId.title_zh: 该快照对应的结果 token（资产）。

snapshots.timestamp.desc_en: When the snapshot was taken, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
snapshots.timestamp.title_zh: 快照采集时间，Unix 时间戳（毫秒）。

snapshots.tickSize.desc_en: Minimum price increment for the market.
snapshots.tickSize.title_zh: 该市场的最小价格变动单位。

snapshots.indexedAt.desc_en: When the snapshot was indexed by the service, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
snapshots.indexedAt.title_zh: 服务为该快照建立索引的时间，Unix 时间戳（毫秒）。

snapshots.market.desc_en: On-chain condition ID of the market this snapshot belongs to.
snapshots.market.title_zh: 该快照所属市场的链上 condition ID。

pagination.title_zh: 快照结果的分页元信息。

pagination.limit.desc_en: The page size applied to this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应采用的页大小。

pagination.count.desc_en: Number of snapshots returned in this response.
pagination.count.title_zh: 本次响应返回的快照数量。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor to fetch the next chunk of snapshots.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 获取下一批快照的游标。

pagination.has_more.title_zh: 是否还有更多快照可取。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

user.desc_en: Wallet address whose activity to return; omit to return activity across all users.
user.title_zh: 待查询活动的钱包地址；省略则返回所有用户的活动。

start_time.desc_en: Only return activity at or after this Unix timestamp in seconds.
start_time.title_zh: 仅返回时间不早于此刻的活动，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.desc_en: Only return activity at or before this Unix timestamp in seconds.
end_time.title_zh: 仅返回时间不晚于此刻的活动，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

market_slug.desc_en: Restrict activity to a single market identified by its slug. Mutually exclusive with condition_id.
market_slug.title_zh: 按市场 slug 限定活动，与 condition_id 互斥。

condition_id.desc_en: Restrict activity to a single market identified by its condition ID. Mutually exclusive with market_slug.
condition_id.title_zh: 按 condition ID 限定活动，与 market_slug 互斥。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of activity records to return in this page.
limit.title_zh: 本页最多返回的活动记录数量。

pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass back the value from the previous response's pagination object.
pagination_key.title_zh: 翻页游标，回传上一页响应 pagination 中的值。

activities.desc_en: The list of matching activity records.

activities.token_id.desc_en: Outcome token ID involved in the activity.
activities.token_id.title_zh: 该活动涉及的结果 token ID。

activities.side.desc_en: Type of activity: a token merge, split, or redeem.
activities.side.title_zh: 活动类型：token 的合并、拆分或赎回。

activities.market_slug.desc_en: Slug of the market the activity relates to.

activities.condition_id.desc_en: On-chain condition ID of the related market.
activities.condition_id.title_zh: 关联市场的链上 condition ID。

activities.shares.desc_en: Raw share quantity as recorded on-chain (before normalization).
activities.shares.title_zh: 链上记录的原始份额数量（未归一化）。

activities.shares_normalized.desc_en: Share quantity normalized to whole-share units (raw value scaled down by 1,000,000).
activities.shares_normalized.title_zh: 归一化后的份额数量（原始值除以 1,000,000）。

activities.price.annotation: 源码未声明价格单位与取值范围，待研发确认。

activities.block_number.desc_en: Block height at which the activity was recorded on-chain.
activities.block_number.title_zh: 活动上链所在的区块高度。

activities.log_index.desc_en: Index of the activity's event log within its block.
activities.log_index.title_zh: 活动事件日志在区块内的索引。

activities.tx_hash.desc_en: Hash of the transaction that recorded the activity.
activities.tx_hash.title_zh: 记录该活动的交易哈希。

activities.timestamp.desc_en: When the activity occurred, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
activities.timestamp.title_zh: 活动发生时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

activities.order_hash.desc_en: Hash of the associated order, if any.

activities.user.desc_en: Wallet address that performed the activity.
activities.user.title_zh: 执行该活动的钱包地址。

pagination.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.limit.desc_en: The page size applied to this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应采用的页大小。

pagination.count.desc_en: Total number of activity records matching the filters.
pagination.count.title_zh: 匹配筛选条件的活动记录总数。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; present only when more results exist.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 下一页的游标；仅在还有更多结果时出现。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

at_time.desc_en: Unix timestamp in seconds at which to read the historical price; omit to get the most real-time price.
at_time.title_zh: 读取历史价格的时间点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；省略则返回最实时的价格。

price.desc_en: The market price of the outcome token, expressed as a probability between 0 and 1.
price.title_zh: 该结果 token 的市场价格，以 0 到 1 之间的概率表示。

at_time.desc_en: The timestamp the returned price corresponds to, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
at_time.title_zh: 返回价格所对应的时间点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of positions to return per page.
limit.title_zh: 每页最多返回的持仓数量。

pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor returned by a previous request, used to fetch the next page.
pagination_key.title_zh: 上一次请求返回的游标，用于获取下一页。

wallet_address.desc_en: The queried wallet address, normalized to lowercase.
wallet_address.title_zh: 被查询的钱包地址，已归一化为小写。

positions.wallet.title_zh: 持有该持仓的钱包地址。

positions.token_id.desc_en: Outcome token ID held in this position.
positions.token_id.title_zh: 该持仓持有的结果 token ID。

positions.condition_id.desc_en: On-chain condition ID of the position's market.
positions.condition_id.title_zh: 持仓所属市场的链上 condition ID。

positions.shares.title_zh: 持有的原始份额数量（未归一化）。

positions.shares_normalized.desc_en: Share quantity normalized to whole-share units (raw value scaled down by 1,000,000).
positions.shares_normalized.title_zh: 归一化后的份额数量（原始值除以 1,000,000）。

positions.redeemable.desc_en: Whether the position can be redeemed, which requires the market to be completed and closed.
positions.redeemable.title_zh: 该持仓是否可赎回；需市场已完成并关闭。

positions.event_slug.desc_en: Slug of the event the position's market belongs to.
positions.event_slug.title_zh: 持仓所属市场归属事件的 slug。

positions.image.desc_en: URL of the market's display image.

positions.label.desc_en: Outcome label of the held token (e.g. Yes/No).
positions.label.title_zh: 所持 token 的结果标签（如 Yes/No）。

positions.winning_outcome.desc_en: Details of the winning outcome once the market is closed; null while open or undetermined.
positions.winning_outcome.title_zh: 市场关闭后获胜结果的详情；仍开放或未定时为 null。

positions.winning_outcome.id.desc_en: Token ID of the winning outcome.

positions.start_time.desc_en: Market start time, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
positions.start_time.title_zh: 市场开始时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

positions.end_time.desc_en: Market end time, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
positions.end_time.title_zh: 市场结束时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

positions.completed_time.desc_en: Market completion time, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; null when not completed.
positions.completed_time.title_zh: 市场完成时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；未完成时为 null。

positions.close_time.desc_en: Market close time, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; null while still open.
positions.close_time.title_zh: 市场关闭时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仍开放时为 null。

positions.game_start_time.desc_en: Game start time for sports markets; null for non-sports markets.
positions.game_start_time.title_zh: 体育类市场的赛事开始时间；非体育市场为 null。

positions.market_status.desc_en: Whether the position's market is open or closed.
positions.market_status.title_zh: 持仓所属市场为开放还是已关闭。

positions.negativeRisk.desc_en: Whether the position's market is part of a negative-risk group.
positions.negativeRisk.title_zh: 持仓所属市场是否属于 negative-risk 组。

pagination.title_zh: 持仓结果的分页元信息。

pagination.has_more.title_zh: 是否还有更多持仓可取。

pagination.limit.desc_en: The page size applied to this request.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次请求采用的页大小。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor to fetch the next page; null when there are no more pages.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 获取下一页的游标；无更多页时为 null。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

eoa.desc_en: Externally owned account address to look up. Provide exactly one of eoa, proxy, or handle.
eoa.title_zh: 待查询的外部账户（EOA）地址。eoa、proxy、handle 三者须且仅须提供其一。

proxy.desc_en: Proxy wallet address to look up. Provide exactly one of eoa, proxy, or handle.
proxy.title_zh: 待查询的代理钱包地址。eoa、proxy、handle 三者须且仅须提供其一。

handle.desc_en: User handle to look up; an optional leading @ is stripped automatically. Provide exactly one of eoa, proxy, or handle.
handle.title_zh: 待查询的用户 handle，开头的 @ 会被自动去除。eoa、proxy、handle 三者须且仅须提供其一。

with_metrics.desc_en: Pass true to also compute and return trading metrics; they are calculated only on demand for performance.
with_metrics.title_zh: 传 true 时额外计算并返回交易指标；出于性能考虑仅按需计算。

start_time.desc_en: Start of the window for metric calculation, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; only used when with_metrics=true.
start_time.title_zh: 指标计算窗口的起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仅在 with_metrics=true 时生效。

end_time.desc_en: End of the window for metric calculation, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; only used when with_metrics=true.
end_time.title_zh: 指标计算窗口的终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仅在 with_metrics=true 时生效。

eoa.desc_en: The resolved externally owned account address.
eoa.title_zh: 解析得到的外部账户（EOA）地址。

proxy.title_zh: 解析得到的代理钱包地址。

handle.desc_en: The user's handle; null when none is set.
handle.title_zh: 用户 handle；未设置时为 null。

pseudonym.desc_en: The user's display pseudonym; null when none is set.
pseudonym.title_zh: 用户的展示化名；未设置时为 null。

image.desc_en: URL of the user's profile image; null when none is set.
image.title_zh: 用户头像的 URL；未设置时为 null。

wallet_metrics.desc_en: Trading metrics for the wallet; present only when with_metrics=true.
wallet_metrics.title_zh: 钱包的交易指标；仅在 with_metrics=true 时出现。

wallet_metrics.total_volume.desc_en: Total trading volume of the wallet, in USD.

wallet_metrics.total_trades.desc_en: Total number of trades where this wallet was the maker.
wallet_metrics.total_trades.title_zh: 该钱包作为 maker 的总成交笔数。

wallet_metrics.total_markets.desc_en: Number of distinct markets the wallet has traded in.
wallet_metrics.total_markets.title_zh: 钱包参与交易的不同市场数量。

wallet_metrics.highest_volume_day.desc_en: The single day with the highest traded share volume.

wallet_metrics.highest_volume_day.date.desc_en: Calendar date of the highest-volume day.
wallet_metrics.highest_volume_day.date.title_zh: 成交量最高那一天的日期。

wallet_metrics.highest_volume_day.volume.desc_en: Shares traded that day, normalized (raw value scaled down by 1,000,000).
wallet_metrics.highest_volume_day.volume.title_zh: 当日成交份额，归一化值（原始值除以 1,000,000）。

wallet_metrics.highest_volume_day.trades.desc_en: Number of trades executed that day.

wallet_metrics.merges.desc_en: Total token merges performed by the wallet.
wallet_metrics.merges.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 合并总次数。

wallet_metrics.splits.desc_en: Total token splits performed by the wallet.
wallet_metrics.splits.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 拆分总次数。

wallet_metrics.conversions.desc_en: Total token conversions performed by the wallet.
wallet_metrics.conversions.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 转换总次数。

wallet_metrics.redemptions.desc_en: Total token redemptions performed by the wallet.
wallet_metrics.redemptions.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 赎回总次数。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

condition_id.desc_en: On-chain condition ID identifying the market to fetch candlesticks for.
condition_id.title_zh: 待查询 K 线的市场链上 condition ID。

start_time.desc_en: Start of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
start_time.title_zh: 时间范围起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.desc_en: End of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
end_time.title_zh: 时间范围终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

interval.desc_en: Candle granularity in minutes (1 = 1m, 60 = 1h, 1440 = 1d); each granularity caps the allowed range (1m up to 1 week, 1h up to 1 month, 1d up to 1 year).
interval.title_zh: K 线粒度（按分钟：1 = 1 分钟，60 = 1 小时，1440 = 1 天）；各粒度有最大范围限制（1 分钟至多 1 周，1 小时至多 1 个月，1 天至多 1 年）。

candlesticks.desc_en: Per-outcome candlestick series; each element pairs a candlestick data array with that token's metadata (token_id and outcome label).
candlesticks.title_zh: 按结果划分的 K 线序列；每个元素由一段 K 线数据数组与该 token 的元数据（token_id 与结果标签）配对组成。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

required.desc_en: Names of the required parameters that were missing from the request.
required.title_zh: 请求中缺失的必填参数名称。

wallet_address.desc_en: The 0x-prefixed wallet address to compute PnL for.
wallet_address.title_zh: 待计算盈亏的 0x 前缀钱包地址。

granularity.desc_en: Time bucket size for the PnL series (day, week, month, year, or the whole period).
granularity.title_zh: 盈亏序列的时间分桶粒度（日、周、月、年或全部时段）。

start_time.desc_en: Start of the range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; defaults to the day of the wallet's first trade when omitted.
start_time.title_zh: 范围起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；省略时默认取该钱包首笔交易当日。

end_time.desc_en: End of the range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; defaults to the current date when omitted.
end_time.title_zh: 范围终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；省略时默认取当前日期。

granularity.desc_en: The time bucket size applied to the returned series.
granularity.title_zh: 返回序列采用的时间分桶粒度。

start_time.desc_en: Start of the computed range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
start_time.title_zh: 实际计算范围的起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.desc_en: End of the computed range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
end_time.title_zh: 实际计算范围的终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

wallet_address.desc_en: The wallet address the PnL was computed for.
wallet_address.title_zh: 计算盈亏所针对的钱包地址。

pnl_over_time.desc_en: Realized PnL series, one point per time bucket.
pnl_over_time.title_zh: 已实现盈亏序列，每个时间分桶一个数据点。

pnl_over_time.timestamp.desc_en: Start of the time bucket, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
pnl_over_time.timestamp.title_zh: 该时间分桶的起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

pnl_over_time.pnl_to_date.desc_en: Cumulative realized PnL up to this bucket.
pnl_over_time.pnl_to_date.title_zh: 截至该分桶的累计已实现盈亏。
pnl_over_time.pnl_to_date.annotation: 源码未声明盈亏金额的货币单位，待研发确认。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
error.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
message.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。
